title: Regional Dialects
shortSummary: Understand how Spanish varies across the world — from Castilian to Rioplatense, Mexican to Caribbean. Learn to recognise and adapt to different accents, vocabulary, and grammar variations.
whyItMatters: Spanish is not one language — it is dozens of varieties spoken across 20+ countries. Understanding regional differences helps you communicate with any Spanish speaker and shows cultural sensitivity.
coreConcepts: Mexican Spanish: vocabulary and accent differences
Peninsular vs Latin American vocabulary differences
How to adapt your Spanish to different audiences
